title: Execution Capability Baseline
objective: Observe and model the worker's current execution capabilities without changing them.
research_rules_applied: Every assertion classified as observed, inferred or assumed.

extensions.value: 6 subagent policy profiles under ~/.config/opencode/agent; @opencode-ai/plugin dependency present; no plugin/ directory

execution_model.justification: Derived from workflow, branching, deployment and vekling-delegation skills.
execution_model.summary: A control-plane orchestrator (Slarti) plans and delegates; execution follows a 7-phase workflow with a branch-first model (PATCH/REFACTOR/LANDSLIDE) under a Git-workflow deployment mandate. Subagent delegation is gated by explicit operator approval.

canonical_skill_id_scheme.justification: No canonical id scheme is declared in metadata; the skill directory name is adopted as the canonical id. Marked assumed because it is a chosen convention, not an observed declaration.

canonical_capability_id_scheme.justification: Chosen naming convention for this baseline; not observed from any declaration.

phase_3_canonicalization.capability_mapping_note: Each skill maps 1:1 to a cap.skill.<name> capability; each tool entrypoint maps 1:1 to a cap.tool.<entrypoint> capability. See capabilities.json for the full mapping.

skills_discovered.note: On-disk skill units. Runtime available_skills also lists 27 (swaps disk-only project-clarification-loop for builtin customize-opencode).

capabilities_discovered.note: 12 tool entrypoints (observed) + 28 skill capabilities (inferred) + 4 implicit capabilities (inferred).

assumed_ratio.note: Assumptions exist only in the phase-3 id schemes, which are not counted as capabilities.

orphan_capabilities.note: No capability is referenced by an edge without being defined; all edge endpoints exist in capabilities.json. Leaf/standalone nodes (e.g. cap.tool.glob) are not treated as orphans.

dependency_cycles.note: No directed cycles in the inferred edge set.

unknowns.item: Runtime availability of Ollama local models
unknowns.note: Configured in opencode.jsonc but not exercised (documentation_only).

unknowns.item: Full transitive dependency set per skill
unknowns.note: Only dependencies described in SKILL.md text were captured; undescribed dependencies are unknown by omission.

unknowns.item: Whether project-clarification-loop.md is loadable at runtime
unknowns.note: Present on disk as a bare .md but absent from the runtime available_skills block.
